paper.title: The Walt Disney Company and OpenAI reach landmark agreement to bring beloved characters to Sora
paper.abstract: Disney and OpenAI have reached an agreement to bring more than 200 Disney, Marvel, Pixar and Star Wars characters to Sora for fan-inspired short videos. The agreement emphasizes responsible AI in entertainment and includes Disney’s company-wide use of ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
